name_en: Chanel 24K Box Bag White in stock | Large batch photos
name_cn:
Chanel 24K Box Bag White in stock | Large batch photos
A makeup box bag that caught my eye immediately in the display cabinet. Elegant and structured, it looks simply beautiful when held!! It can serve as a collection piece or a functional makeup box. The bag features double C logos! Full of vintage retro vibes ✨✨🖤. It has good capacity and is suitable for various occasions, can be worn crossbody or handheld!! Original sheepskin is worth buying!!
Size: 12.5×18×6.5cm
Model: AS5167
